title: Darker

{{Quote|I am called ''The Darker''. This is my domain. And I alone choose what transpires within it.|The Darker|<ref name="SW67" />}}
The '''Darker''' was a being composed entirely of the hate, anger, fear and other negative emotions of the [[Arbran (species)|Arbran]] [[Species/Legends|species]], who purged their bodies of such ill feelings before leaving their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] [[Arbra/Legends|Arbra]] behind to start anew. Their dark energy manifested into the Darker, a creature that had the ability to instill negative emotions in other beings, but was kept trapped within an ancient city with a force screen. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] established a major base on Arbra, a development that the Darker attempted to use to his advantage to escape. However, after luring several Rebels into his lair, the Darker was killed by the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], who overcame the Darker's powers with the help of the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and several native [[Hoojib/Legends|Hoojibs]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Perhaps I shall tell you of the people who inhabited this planet eons ago, a people whose civilization progressed to the point—where they sought to ''rid'' themselves of their baser emotions: anger, hatred, fear and the like. Eventually their technology allowed them to succeed! But they quickly found that the dark energy they drained off could not be ''destroyed!'' And as you may have guessed... that energy was me.|The Darker|<ref name="SW67" />}}
Eons before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Arbran (species)|Arbrans]] who originally inhabited the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Arbra/Legends|Arbra]] developed technologically to the point where they discovered how to rid themselves of the emotions of anger, hatred, and fear. However, when they removed the dark energy from their bodies, those negative emotions manifested themselves into a [[Sentience/Legends|sapient]] being that called himself the Darker. Still seeing the Darker as part of them, the Arbrans decided against destroying him—not long afterward, the Arbrans abandoned their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] to start anew on a new planet, leaving their dark aspect behind trapped behind a force screen in the ruins of a forgotten city. Over the millennia, a new telepathic species developed on Arbra called [[Hoojib/Legends|Hoojibs]]. The Hoojibs made their home beneath the surface of the planet, but had never entered the tunnel leading to the Darker's prison because they sensed great evil there.<ref name="SW67" />

[[File:WhatsGoinOn-MSW67.png|thumb|left|250px|Chewbacca throws the Darker into the force screen, destroying the entity.]]
In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], following the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] established their new [[Haven Base|base]] of operations on Arbra. The Darker detected that the Rebels had the technology to free him from his prison, nd immediately got to work creating a fake distress call that could lure one of the planet's new visitors to his lair. Eventually, his call ensnared an [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] called [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], which the Darker captured and disassembled intending to use the components to build a mechanism to disable the force screen which held him captive. R2-D2 was followed by several more Rebels investigating the [[Droid/Legends|droid's]] disappearance, including fellow droid [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], and several Hoojibs. The Darker intended to dismantle C-3PO as well, and used his powers over dark emotions to bring forth hatred in Chewbacca toward C-3PO, causing the Wookiee to turn on the droid.<ref name="SW67" />

While fleeing from the Wookiee through the city, C-3PO discovered an ancient Arbran text which revealed the Darker's weakness: the power of the force screen which held the Darker within the city would destroy him if he contacted it. Chewbacca then surprised the Darker by overcoming his induced hatred with C-3PO's help, after being reminded of his loyalty to his longtime companion [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. With the help of the Hoojibs, Chewbacca then battled through the crushing fear the Darker attempted to subdue him with, fighting his way within reach of the being himself. Chewbacca then grasped the Darker and hurled him into the force screen, destroying the creature—the ensuing explosion razed the ancient city to the ground.<ref name="SW67" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|You... you're acting of your own free will? Astonishing! I didn't think it possible! Your affections must truly be remarkable, to pull you from the anger I induced. But let us see if they are ''equally'' effective against another favorite of mine: the chill, heart-bursting grasp of—terror!|The Darker, to Chewbacca|<ref name="SW67" />}}
[[File:DarkerChewie.jpg|thumb|right|200px|The Darker subdues Chewbacca by imposing fear in the Wookiee.]]
The Darker was aptly named—he was a creature of pure malice, evil and ill intent, having been formed solely out of the hatred, anger and fear of an entire civilization. Granted enormous control over the emotions of the beings around it, the Darker reveled in the power it had, and enjoyed being able to twist the minds of its victims. The Darker particularly enjoyed inducing fear in the minds of its targets, and experienced genuine surprise when his control was overcome. The Darker manifested as a floating [[Color/Legends|green]]-skinned reptilian creature, wearing a flowing red robe.<ref name="SW67" />

==Powers and abilities==
{{Quote|You've an admirable capacity for anger. Shall we see what occurs when the loyalty behind that anger is changed into raw, unbridled hatred?|The Darker to Chewbacca|<ref name="SW67" />}}
Within the force screen that entrapped the Darker within the ancient Arbran city he called home, the creature had significant power over the same negative emotions that composed him. The Darker had the ability to instill fear, anger and hatred in any creature it came into contact with, either creating them from scratch, or twisting existing emotions into what he desired. For instance, the Darker could twist loyalty into violent hatred and anger. However, these powers were not absolute—with enough willpower, they could be overcome. And while the Darker appeared invulnerable to conventional attacks, he could be destroyed by the same energy that created him, the force screen that held him in place.<ref name="SW67" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Darker appeared as the antagonist of [[Star Wars (1977) 67|''Star Wars'' (1977) 67]], written by [[David Michelinie]], illustrated by [[Ron Frenz]] and released in [[1982]].<ref name="SW67" />
